source_rationale: ADIPOQ (adiponectin) is a hallmark adipokine secreted exclusively by mature adipocytes

CD3D is a TCR complex component confirming T cell identity
MAL is a lipid raft protein enriched in naive T cells
NELL2 is a secreted glycoprotein enriched in naive T cells
LDHB is a metabolic enzyme enriched in naive T cells with oxidative metabolism
ATP1B3 is the top marker, a Na+/K+ ATPase subunit expressed in adipocyte precursors
PDK4 is a pyruvate dehydrogenase kinase involved in fatty acid metabolism in adipocytes
CIDEA is a lipid droplet-associated protein characteristic of brown/beige adipocytes
FKBP5 is a glucocorticoid-responsive gene expressed in adipocyte precursors
FBXO32 (atrogin-1) is involved in protein degradation in adipose tissue
ZBTB16 (PLZF) is a transcription factor expressed in adipocyte precursors
ACSL4 is a long-chain acyl-CoA synthetase involved in lipid metabolism
PDE3B is a phosphodiesterase regulating lipolysis in adipocytes
LAMA2 (laminin alpha-2) is an ECM component in adipose tissue stroma
NTRK2 (TrkB) is a neurotrophin receptor expressed in adipocyte precursors
EBF2 is the top marker, a transcription factor defining brown/beige adipocyte precursors
PPARGC1A (PGC-1alpha) is a transcriptional coactivator for thermogenesis in brown/beige adipocytes
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein characteristic of adipocytes
BTNL9 is a butyrophilin-like molecule expressed in adipose tissue
LEPR (leptin receptor) is expressed on adipocyte precursors and stromal cells
CCDC3 is an adipocyte-enriched secreted protein
PRKAR2B is a PKA regulatory subunit involved in lipolysis signaling in adipocytes
ESRRG is an estrogen-related receptor involved in mitochondrial biogenesis in brown adipocytes
AQP7 is a glycerol channel expressed in adipocytes for glycerol release during lipolysis
RGS6 is the top marker, a G-protein signaling regulator in smooth muscle/pericyte cells
MYH11 expression indicates smooth muscle cell identity
ACTA2 (alpha-SMA) is a smooth muscle cell contractile marker
LMOD1 is a smooth muscle-specific actin nucleator
FOS is an immediate early gene suggesting activated/stress-responsive smooth muscle cells
FOSB is an immediate early gene indicating recent activation in smooth muscle cells
IGFBP7 is expressed in pericytes and smooth muscle cells
NTRK3 (TrkC) is a neurotrophin receptor expressed in smooth muscle/pericyte cells
EDNRA (endothelin receptor A) mediates vasoconstriction in smooth muscle cells
SYNPO2 (myopodin) is a smooth muscle-enriched actin-binding protein
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
COL1A2 encodes type I collagen, the major structural protein produced by fibroblasts
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen alpha-1 chain, a hallmark fibroblast product
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast marker receptor tyrosine kinase
LUM (lumican) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts
CXCL14 is a chemokine constitutively expressed by fibroblasts
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) is an ECM glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
THY1 (CD90) is a GPI-anchored glycoprotein marking fibroblast subsets
MFAP5 (MAGP-2) is a microfibril-associated protein produced by fibroblasts
COL3A1 encodes type III collagen, a major fibroblast ECM component
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is a chemokine constitutively produced by stromal fibroblasts
CFD (adipsin) is expressed by adipose-derived fibroblasts
